title: Cobblemon - NK's Decidueye Edits
description: Remodel/Extra animations for Decidueye for the Cobblemon mod.
body:
### _Note for Cobblemon 1.5_
_As you may be aware, Decidueye was pretty much completely remodeled in the new 1.5 update. You may have also noticed that this resource pack doesn't exactly work flawlessly on 1.5 in its current state. I have no plans to make any significant changes to this new model, but I do plan to make a bunch of new animations for it, as well as tweak/port some old ones to the new model. I have no clue when the updated resource pack will be ready to be released, but I've also been quite busy with IRL stuff lately, so please, don't expect it to be soon. Thank you all for your patience._

## 

This resource pack aims to remodel Decidueye's face to mirror the original design a little more, and gives it some extra features - including but not limited to a proper walking animation - to complement it.

This resource pack includes:

- A somewhat scuffed edit of Decidueye's official Cobblemon model/texture

- 6 new animations for Decidueye (new walking animation, battle animation, fainting animation, cry animation, sleeping animation, and a subtle new idle animation)

- Very dim emissive eyes

NOTE: This is my first time modeling anything. I am still quite new to Blockbench/3D art in general, so any tips and constructive criticism(and praises!) are encouraged. Thank you!
